title: My Projects
text:
Hello —
      I’m Sam Fo.
      I’m passionate about incorporating data into everyday life. Over on the right are a few things I’ve built because I wanted to know the answer — click through to try them live.
      
        
        Connect on LinkedIn
        →
      
    
  

  

  Projects

  
    
      Featured · Vision Model
      Ball Python Morph Identifier
      
        I used to keep pet snakes, so I built a classifier that identifies the different morphs
        a ball python carries from a photo. Snakes are incredibly cute and beautiful!
      
      
        PyTorch
        fastai
        Hugging Face
        Live
      
      
        Open on Hugging Face →
      
    
    
      
    
  

  More projects

  

    
      
      
        Dashboard
        Solar Savers
        I built this while figuring out whether solar panels were worth it for my old family house — handy if you live somewhere sunny like the Prairies.

title: Connect with me
text: Hi there! My name is Sam Fo and I’m passionate about incorporating data into everyday life. Feel free to connect with me on Linkedin
